summary: W-9 Viewer X Close Button Feature - All 5 features working correctly. The Edit Employee modal W-9 viewer now includes: X button in top right header, Close button in footer, and Download button in footer. All close mechanisms (X button, Close button, background click) work correctly.

edit_employee_modal_eye_button.details: Eye icon button in Edit Employee W-9 section opens W-9 viewer modal

w9_viewer_x_button.details: X (✕) button in top right corner of W-9 viewer modal header. White text on dark gradient background. Closes modal when clicked.

w9_viewer_close_button.details: Close button in W-9 viewer modal footer (left side). Closes modal when clicked.

w9_viewer_download_button.details: Download button in W-9 viewer modal footer (right side, cyan gradient). Downloads the W-9 file when clicked.

w9_viewer_modal_structure.details: W-9 viewer modal has z-index 60 (above Edit Employee modal z-index 50). Shows document title in header, PDF/image viewer in middle, action buttons in footer.

test_data.test_employee: Lisa Martinez (4 W-9 documents including approved and on-file status)

seed_data_creation: Used existing Lisa Martinez data with W-9 documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: W-9 Viewer X Close Button feature verified working. Edit Employee modal > W-9 Tax Documents section > Eye icon opens W-9 viewer modal with: X button (✕) in header, Close button in footer, Download button in footer. All work correctly. Modal has z-index 60 to appear above Edit Employee modal (z-index 50).
